content: The working memory capacity limit that constrains AI agent reasoning can be intentionally leveraged as a feature to improve the quality of outreach from sales prospecting AI agents, rather than being treated as a pure technical flaw. Instead of flooding prospects with hyper-personalized messages that pull from every possible data point about a lead, prospecting agents can be designed to only retain and use the 3-5 most high-signal attributes of a prospect, mirroring the working memory limits of human sales reps to create more natural, less creepy outreach.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
